The France U23 international has moved to the Eagles from Olympique Marseille with immediate effect after agreeing a contract until 2030.

arts.ttl: Official | Elye Wahi joins Eintracht Frankfurt from Marseille
arts.sum: Marseille centre-forward Elye Wahi (22) has joined Eintracht Frankfurt, both clubs have announced. The Bundesliga side were in the market for a striker following their €80m sale of Egypt international…

arts.ttl: Elye Wahi: Who is the France U21 sensation replacing Omar Marmoush at Eintracht Frankfurt?
arts.sum: However, although Wahi went on to star in the 5-0 win over former side Montpellier with a goal and assist, the likes of Neal Maupay and Mason Greenwood - as well as a thigh injury - saw his game time limited in the first half of the campaign. His first call-up to France's youth set-up followed months later, and his first-team debut and maiden goal came the following season, Wahi becoming the club's youngest-ever goalscorer aged just 18 years and 13 days .

arts.ttl: When Will Omar Marmoush Make His Manchester City Debut?
arts.sum: Omar Marmoush can debut for Manchester City as early as Jan. 25 when Chelsea visits the Etihad.
